question_text: Which of the following scenarios involves the greatest acceleration?

options.label: A
options.text: A car increasing speed from 10 m/s to 20 m/s in 4 seconds

options.label: B
options.text: A ball thrown upwards, slowing from 25 m/s to 5 m/s in 2 seconds

options.label: C
options.text: A cyclist accelerating from rest to 12 m/s over a distance of 60 metres

options.label: D
options.text: A train uniformly accelerating at 0.8 m/s² for 15 seconds

explanation: A: a = (20-10)÷4 = 2.5 m/s². B: a = (5-25)÷2 = -10 m/s² (magnitude = 10 m/s²). C: Using v² = u² + 2as: 144 = 0 + 2a(60); a = 1.2 m/s². D: a = 0.8 m/s². Option B has the greatest magnitude of acceleration (10 m/s²).
